//: Compiler SETTINGS for the host-side halves (server/, worker/, mcp/, hooks/). Mirrors the host's backend tsconfig: lib ES2022 + DOM (the vendored contract carries `/// <reference lib="dom" />`), node types for fs/os/process, strict. NOTE: this file does NOT typecheck directly, because the source imports `../../types` — a path that, in a flat standalone repo, points above the repo root (in production the extension is nested one dir deeper). `npm run verify` reproduces the production directory nesting in a temp mirror and runs tsc from there, so `../../types` resolves exactly as the host resolves it. See README → 'How types resolve'.
